business_ideas.idea: GA4 migration service business - help companies migrate from Google Analytics to GA4 for $1500+
B2B trade show business in niche industries - automotive testing, aircraft interiors, fintech events
Niche Twitter influencer partnerships for trade shows (strip mall guy, motorhome guy, etc.)

predictions.text: GA4 migration services could generate $1M+ revenue in 6 months due to forced migration pressure
B2B trade shows sell for 10-15x profit multiples versus Ecom at 1x revenue; more defensible
Podcasts have significantly more influence than believed; will shape next political election outcomes
Trade show businesses can last 100+ years; survive recessions better than consumer-focused businesses
